The '''Royal cannon''' was a deployable heavy weapon employed by the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]]. It traveled on the battlefield in a compact egg-shaped configuration, moving on a tripod of repulsor pads. For firing, the [[Cannon/Legends|cannon]] was raised up off the tripod, splitting the main structure into three panels.

==Behind the scenes==
The royal cannon first appeared in the [[2001]] game ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''<ref name="GB">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''</ref> and was also used in the expansion pack [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']] released in [[2003]].<ref name="GBCP">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''</ref>
